summary: Vendor Dashboard Upgrade V218 Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: 41/41 data-testids verified across both PartnerDashboardPage and VendorDashboardPage. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing vendor orders data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Dashboard upgrade fully tested. The /api/partner-portal/dashboard endpoint returns vendor_kpis, vendor_pipeline, work_requiring_action, recent_assignments, and charts. Both PartnerDashboardPage (/partner) and VendorDashboardPage (/partner/vendor-dashboard) use this same endpoint. Partner login uses unified /login page which stores partner_token in localStorage. The partnerApi library reads from localStorage partner_token.

response_fields.work_requiring_action: PASS - array with urgency, title, description fields, sorted by urgency
response_fields.recent_assignments: PASS - vendor-safe data (vendor_order_no, vendor_price, no customer names)

charts.fulfillment_trend: PASS - 6 monthly entries with month, assigned, completed
charts.delivery_performance: PASS - 6 monthly entries with month, on_time, delayed

response_fields.partner: PASS - partner info with name and id
response_fields.summary: PASS - catalog_count, active_allocations, pending_fulfillment, completed_jobs, settlement_total_estimate

vendor_safe_verification.recent_assignments_table: PASS - Shows vendor_order_no and vendor_price (labeled 'Your Price'), no customer names or Konekt margins
vendor_safe_verification.forbidden_fields_absent: PASS - No customer_name, customer_email, konekt_margin, sales_price in assignments

charts_rendering.fulfillment_volume: PASS - Bar chart with Assigned/Completed for 6 months
charts_rendering.delivery_performance: PASS - Bar chart with On Time/Delayed for 6 months
